subcodes.first_line: God beareth witness that there is no God but Him, and He Who is seated upon the Throne is verily the Dawning-Place of Mine inspiration and the Source [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و الذی استوی علی العرش انه مشرق الهامی و مطلع
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @call to action
